title: Friction event
description: Comp-suite harness self-improvement loop event. One per line in <STATE_ROOT>/harness/friction.jsonl. See SPEC-learn.md § 4.
$comment: Changelog (newest first). 2026-06-27 (comp-suite#1 / MIM-0045 #15): added target_class 'mcp-tool' (defect in an external MCP tool, e.g. the market server's costing_*/payequity_* surface) and signal_type 'tool-behavior' (tool returned wrong/implausible output). ADDITIVE only — no field removed or renamed; pre-existing friction.jsonl rows remain valid. Rationale: ~13 market-tool costing findings had to be mislabeled target_class:unspecified|schema + signal_type:operator-flagged, which weakened /comp learn grouping.

source.description: manual = /comp friction, auto = orchestrator/hook signal, post-session = /comp close scan.

target_class.description: Class of harness target the friction touches. 'mcp-tool' = a defect in an external MCP tool (e.g. the market server's costing_*/payequity_* surface), not in a comp-suite-owned asset.

description.description: One-line operator-facing description of the friction.

context_engagement_id.description: COMP_ENGAGEMENT_ID at capture time, or null if outside an engagement.

context_mode.description: COMP_ACTIVE_MODE at capture time, or null.

signal_type.description: Origin signal. Aggregator groups by signal_type within target groups. 'tool-behavior' = an external tool returned wrong/implausible/silently-degraded output (pairs with target_class 'mcp-tool').
